query.description: Required when using a SUPER_ADMIN token. Ignored for ADMIN / PROVIDER / CUSTOMER (tenant comes from JWT).

request.description: ADMIN: all bookings in tenant. PROVIDER: own provider’s bookings. CUSTOMER: own bookings only. SUPER_ADMIN: must pass tenantId query.
Same role/tenant access rules as list bookings.
CUSTOMER only. Locks the slot for 15 minutes (expiresAt). Service must belong to the provider and tenant from JWT.

query.description: Required for SUPER_ADMIN. Omit for ADMIN (uses tenant from JWT).

request.description: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN. Deletes non-converted SlotHold rows past expiresAt for the tenant.
